LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT; W/ SUPPORTING DECLARATION, ARGUED, MOTION APPROVED PROVIDED FOLLOWING CHANGES ARE MADE: (1)JUDGMENT TO EXPRESSLY PROVIDE MONETARY RELIEF NOT RESTITUTION BUT PAYMENT IN LIEU OF CIVIL PENALTY AND TO FURTHER PROVIDE DEFENDANTS TO NOT TO GET CREDIT AGAINST FUTURE CLAIM FOR PAYMENT. INFORMATION PROVIDED AS TO CALIFORNIAN FOR ALTERNATIVES TO TOXICS SUFFICIENT TO MEET PROPOSED REGULATION 3203 RECIPIENTS INFORMATION AS TO OTHER RECIPIENTS INADEQUATE AND WILL NOT BE APPROVED UNLESS FURTHER INFORMATION PROVIDED.
